# Web, JavaScript & TypeScript Learning Resources (12)

> Web fundamentals, JavaScript/TypeScript language references, and frontend/backend frameworks.

## Web Fundamentals

| Title | Type | Diff | Concepts | Author | Fresh | Off | Free | Lang |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [MDN Web Docs](https://developer.mozilla.org/) | 📋 API Ref | 🟢 | Language basics, API design, Web security, Networking | Mozilla | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | 🌐✦ |
| [The Modern JavaScript Tutorial](https://javascript.info/) | 📝 Tutorial | 🟢 | Language basics, OOP, FP, Concurrency | Ilya Kantor | 🔄 | ➖ | ✅ | 🌐✦ |
| [TypeScript Handbook](https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/handbook/intro.html) | 📖 Docs | 🟡 | Language basics, Generics, OOP, Language features | Microsoft | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | 🌐✦ |
| [W3C Web Standards & Specifications](https://www.w3.org/standards/) | 📖 Docs | 🔴 | API design, Networking | W3C | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | 🌐✦ |
| [web.dev — Google's Web Development Guidance](https://web.dev/) | 📝 Tutorial | 🟡 | Architecture, Testing, Observability | Google Chrome Team | 🔄 | ✅ | ✅ | 🌐✦ |
